summary: The user is planning to try new recipes for healthy snacks and meal prep, specifically looking for options that pair well with afternoon coffee. They decided to make no-bake energy balls, Greek yogurt with honey and mixed berries, grilled chicken and veggie containers, and roasted veggie bowls, while also selecting specific marinades and beverages to complement their meals.
facts: The user plans to try out new recipes for healthy snacks this weekend. The user usually has another cup of coffee in the afternoon on weekdays. The user likes the sound of energy balls and protein-rich snacks. The user requested specific recipes for no-bake energy balls and Greek yogurt with honey and mixed berries. The user has been making quinoa and roasted vegetables for meal prep. The user decided to try grilled chicken and veggie containers and roasted veggie bowls for meal prep. The user will use Italian-Style and Chipotle Lime marinades for the grilled chicken. The user will prepare Mediterranean-style roasted veggie bowls with feta cheese, olives, and sun-dried tomatoes. The user plans to make Lemon and Mint infused water and Peppermint herbal tea to pair with their meal prep. The user is aiming to reduce their caffeine intake.
